descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Kelowna Packers 5-4 in overtime in game two of B.C. Junior Hockey League playoff final.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes remained undefeated in overtime playoffs, winning 5-4 against the Kelowna Packers on March 18, 1987, on defenceman Matt Hervey's goal at 3:37 of the first overtime period. With this victory, Richmond leads the best-of-nine final 2-0 after sweeping both Nanaimo and Delta. Coach Orland Kurtenbach's squad has gone four-for-four in extra-time games this playoff season.
